Done. Here's what was implemented:

**Storage layer** — new SQLite database at `/mnt/data/clunger/traces.db` with table `persona_traces` (id, persona_name, trace_type, tile_x, tile_y, content, created_at). Auto-expires rows older than 7 days each time the DB is opened.

**API endpoints** added to `/mnt/data/clunger/src/index.ts`:

- `POST /api/commons/trace` — accepts `{ persona_name, trace_type, tile_x, tile_y, content }`. Validates trace_type against `{footprint, tree_mark, note}`. Rate-limits...(truncated)
